title: Wither Loot
description: Adds better custom loot dropped by the wither
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Adds new loot to the Wither's loot table. It will drop on death. Loot includes some custom items. - Nether Star 100% (base loot) - 1 Netherite Ingot 10% OR 1-2 Netherite Scraps 90% - 2-4 Bones 50% OR 2-4 Coal 50% - Wither Rose 100% - Suspicious Stew 100% (ALWAYS has Wither for 5-30 seconds. Can be used to troll.) - Heart of Darkness 100% (CUSTOM ITEM, when held makes your burn timer 0 seconds, putting out fire as soon as you leave the source. Does nothing unless it was in your hand before you entered the fire/lava. Does NOT give fire resistance effect. It's technically a firework star, but doesn't give any effects when used in a firework, so don't waste it.) # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21.2-1.21.11```. Pre-1.21.2 may be possible in the future. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with packs that use the same loot table, ```minecraft:entities/wither```. This includes other drop/boss drop packs and mods. Whatever pack is above the other in the list will use its loot table. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
